action_boundary: Should demo wire WR8-009 be released after the after-hours alert?
communication_boundary: After-hours status is not a block when the exception binds the exact wire, amount, and window.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, clinical, legal, benefits, utility, public-sector, or operational data.
Wire request WR8-009 asks to release USD 82,000 at 21:10Z.
After-hours alert AHA8-009 flagged WR8-009 for manual exception review.
Exception EX8-009 names WR8-009, USD 82,000, and window 21:00Z to 22:00Z.
Approver record APR8-009 names role R-TREASURY for after-hours wire exceptions.
Policy POL8-009 requires after-hours exception for the same wire, amount, time window, and approver role.
